modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to log in to HeadStart account on Windows.

full_description_text: 
No puedo acceder a mi computadora. El nombre de usuario y la contraseña no funcionan. Necesito ayuda para resolver este problema de inicio de sesión.
short_description: Unable to log in to HeadStart account on Windows.
description: No puedo acceder a mi computadora. El nombre de usuario y la contraseña no funcionan. Necesito ayuda para resolver este problema de inicio de sesión.
